name: The Second Cataclysm

uniques: [-1] population [in this city]

name: Equilibrium
uniques: Provides [1] [Emotion Suppressor]

civilopediaText.text: We extol this drug as the opiate of the masses. Willingly sacrificing impulses towards joy, love and elation in order to annihilate grief, jealousy and rage.
